meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Xbox repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Xbox Repair Winnipeg | Series X & Controller Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Xbox repair in Winnipeg. Overheating, HDMI port, disc drive, controller repair for Xbox Series X, Series S, One & 360. Console specialists.
page.heroDescription: Xbox not cooperating? We repair a wide range of Xbox issues across all major models, including HDMI port damage, power or no-power problems, overheating, disc drive issues, and common controller repairs such as stick drift, charging port damage, button issues, or sync problems.

services.name: Overheating Repair
services.description: Clean and service cooling systems to fix Xbox overheating.

services.name: HDMI Port Repair
services.description: Replace damaged HDMI ports—no signal issues fixed. Xbox HDMI repairs involve board-level work.

services.name: No Power Issues
services.description: Diagnose and repair Xbox power supply and boot problems.

services.name: Disc Drive Repair
services.description: Fix disc reading issues and drive replacements.

services.name: Controller Repair
services.description: Fix Xbox controller stick drift, bumper issues, charging ports, button failures, and sync problems.

services.name: Storage Upgrade
services.description: Upgrade internal storage for more game capacity.

advantage_pillars.title: Xbox Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's Xbox Series X, Series S, and One repair experts.

advantage_pillars.title: Elite Controller Pros
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized in Xbox Elite controller repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Console Repair Pros
advantage_pillars.description: HDMI port micro-soldering and board-level repairs. Many can be completed same day.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Lifetime warranty on most Xbox and controller repairs.

models_description: We repair all Xbox consoles including Series X, Series S, One, and 360, plus Elite and standard controllers.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Xbox repair costs depend on the issue—simple fixes like thermal paste are affordable, while HDMI port repairs involve board-level soldering. Microsoft's Xbox hardware troubleshooting guide covers power and connectivity issues.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that console repairs can approach a significant portion of the device's value. iFixit's Xbox teardowns show the internal layout differences across generations.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make financial sense, we'll explain alternatives including trade-in options.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Your game saves are typically backed up to Xbox Live, so data loss is rarely a concern.

faqs.question: Can you fix Xbox Series X overheating?
faqs.answer: Yes! We clean dust buildup, replace thermal paste, and ensure proper airflow.

faqs.question: Do you repair Xbox controller drift?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair analog stick drift on all Xbox controllers including Elite controllers.

faqs.question: Can you fix Xbox HDMI port?
faqs.answer: Yes, HDMI port replacement is a specialty—we use micro-soldering.

faqs.question: Do you repair Xbox Elite controllers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service Elite controllers including stick drift, bumper issues, paddle problems.

faqs.question: My Xbox won't turn on—can you fix it?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair power issues including power supply replacement and board-level repairs.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
